examples: The most serious form of myopathy is called rhabdomyolysis.
The figures for high-risk men were similar, except for myopathy, with an extra 110 cases.
Steroid myopathy may be reversible with a reduction of dose or discontinuation of the steroid.
In the Crestor study, myopathy frequency was the same whether patients got Crestor or a placebo.
Certain medicines interact with this particular statin, increasing the risk of myopathy, or muscle damage.
